name: Sour Cream Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 hard-boiled eggs, yolk mashed 1/2 teaspoon dry mustard
3 tablespoons vinegar (to taste) 1 teaspoon red pepper or paprika
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash the egg yolks.
2. Add salt, mustard, sugar, and red pepper or paprika to the mashed yolks.
3. Mix in the sour cream until well combined.
4. Stir in enough vinegar to achieve a thick and soupy consistency.
5. Fold in the chopped spring onion whites.
6. Serve over Spring leaf lettuce.
